ddls:
CREATE TABLE "runners" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the runner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the runner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the runner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the runner */,
  "bib" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the runner */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the runner (e.g., M 26-35) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the runner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the runner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the runner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the runner registered for the marathon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the runner is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marathons" (
  "marathon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marathon */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the marathon event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the marathon event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the marathon event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the marathon in kilometers */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "maximum_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the marathon is open for registration */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marathon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "marathon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marathon */,
  "chip_time" TEXT /* Chip time of the runner */,
  "chip_pace" TEXT /* Chip pace of the runner */,
  "gender_place" INTEGER /* Place of the runner in their gender category */,
  "age_group_place" INTEGER /* Place of the runner in their age group */,
  "time_to_start" TEXT /* Time taken by the runner to start */,
  "gun_time" TEXT /* Gun time of the runner */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the runner */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Actual finish time of the runner */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON object storing split times at various checkpoints */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the marathon */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the marathon */,
  "pace_band" TEXT /* Pace band used by the runner */,
  "shoe_brand" TEXT /* Brand of shoes used by the runner */,
  "is_disqualified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the runner was disqualified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_marathon_id FOREIGN KEY ("marathon_id") REFERENCES marathons ("marathon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_teams" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the runner joined the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the runner in the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event administrator, team manager, runner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
